strategy: Two-boss fight: Archmagus Lorcan (Balance, resists Balance 80%, takes +30% from Myth, Life, and Death) plus Lord Ombra. Run a team with a hitter using Myth, Life, or Death, supports who blade and Feint, and a healer.
Expect two Elder Magi to spawn at the end of Round 1 and again after any Shadow Sentinel; they stay inactive for two rounds, so use that window to set up.
Once he gains his Shadow Pip he casts Shadow Sentinel every 3 rounds. Time your hitter's big AoE for a round the Sentinel is down, or clear the Sentinel first.
When his Shadow Sentinel expires the Elder Magi self-Sacrifice for 10,000 Fire and heal him 1,500. Let it happen to clear the Magi rather than killing them by hand.
Clear the Elder Magi before Lorcan so nothing keeps reviving the Sacrifice loop, then burst Lorcan down.
Lord Ombra steals 4 pips from your highest-pip wizard every 4 rounds. Spend pips before his steal window so he grabs an empty hand.
cheatNotes: Two Elder Magi appear at the end of Round 1 and after any Shadow Sentinel cast, but stay inactive for two rounds. Use that window to blade up before they can attack.
Once he has a Shadow Pip he throws Shadow Sentinel every third round; the Sentinel intercepts hits, so time your big attack for a round it is not up or kill it first.
When his Sentinel expires the Magi self-Sacrifice for 10,000 Fire and heal him 1,500. It removes the Magi for you, so it is fine to let it happen rather than killing them manually.
Killing Lorcan before the Elder Magi keeps this Sacrifice-heal from repeating, but the cleaner route is to clear the Magi first so nothing revives the loop.
Every 4 rounds Ombra steals 4 pips from whoever holds the most. Spend pips before his steal window so he grabs an empty hand.
